column1: Ketel Marte leads the way with a steady bat atop Arizona’s lineup, flashing a strong 69.9% hit probability and enjoying both a home park boost and the platoon edge against Reynaldo Lopez. Austin Martin isn’t far behind, bringing a reliable profile and top-of-order role for Kansas City, plus a favorable park and his own platoon advantage to the table. Bo Bichette and Corbin Carroll round out the slate, each with a strong matchup and lineup spot, but Marte’s combination of consistency and context makes him today’s premier pick.
